h3: A Force of Nature: Canada's Strategy to Protect Nature
Funds and resources to help the environment

sections.heading: Weather and hazards
items: Current conditions, forecasts, historical data, alerts, natural hazards.

sections.heading: Climate change
items: Canada’s action, climate future, partnerships, adaptation, health, science, emissions reporting.

sections.heading: Nature
items: Nature strategy and plan, Wildlife, plants and species, Environmental conservation and protection, Nature and science at Parks Canada.

sections.heading: Energy
items: Energy-efficient homes and vehicles, green energy, fuel prices in your area.

sections.heading: Natural resources
items: Canada’s natural resources, water, forests and mining industry.

sections.heading: Agricultural production tools and data
items: Interactive maps, tools, practices and technologies relevant to production in agriculture. Weather, drought, land and water, geospatial products.

sections.heading: Environment and sustainability in agriculture
items: Climate change mitigation, farming practices, environmental impacts and indicators.

sections.heading: Fisheries
items: Licences, permits and funding programs related to fishing, aquaculture and marine mammal harvest.

sections.heading: Pollution and waste management
items: Find out about ways to track and reduce pollution and waste.

sections.heading: Environment statistics
items: Data, tools and reports providing the latest information on the environment in Canada.

sections.heading: Water and the environment
items: Water quantity, freshwater quality, cleaning up our lakes and rivers, water science, sustainability indicators, marine water quality, protecting water.

sections.heading: A Force of Nature: Canada's Strategy to Protect Nature
items: Canada’s plan to protect and value nature - a foundation of our economy, sovereignty, and well-being.

sections.heading: Funds and resources to help the environment
items: Programs and incentives to help you take climate action.

sections.heading: #BeatPlasticPollution challenge
items: Take the #BeatPlasticPollution challenge and be part of the solution to end plastic pollution. Big or small, every action counts!
